reapack.name: cueport_sync.lua
reapack.desc: CuePort Sync — Artist comments as markers

metadata.description:
# CuePort Sync
Reaper integration for CuePort — pulls top-level artist comments for the active version of a production and places them as project markers with an on-hover tooltip showing the full text. Plus a floating pill with quick actions (sync, change project, open main window).

version.author: CuePort
version.changelog: v2.3.2 — Floating menu as separate persistent window (toggle + stays open). v2.0.0 — Major UI rework (English + CuePort theme + logo + non-dockable).
